prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 4B12T (2.4L MIVEC turbocharged inline-4) internals with forged pistons (JE 2618T, 8.5:1 compression) and Manley H-beam connecting rods (80330-4) to handle 1.5 bar boost reliably. Pair with a Tomei 272° camshaft (Type-R) for improved mid-to-high RPM power delivery.

Forced Induction: Swap the OEM Mitsubishi TD04-12T turbo for a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II (0.82 A/R, ball-bearing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe (SARD) and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 1.3-1.4 bar mapping. Retain the stock intercooler but upgrade to a PWR 450mm core for reduced intake temps.

Drivetrain & Handling: Install a Cusco Type-RS 2-way LSD (1.5-way for street) in the F4A42 front transaxle, paired with a HKS Hi-Power clutch (single-disc, 800kgf clamp load). Suspension upgrades include Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for the Airtrek’s 5-link rear suspension) and Whiteline 24mm adjustable sway bars (front/rear) to eliminate body roll. Braking is handled by Endless CC-RX rotors (330mm front, 300mm rear) with AP Racing CP8540 calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Aero: Fit a Varis Japan widebody conversion kit (specific to the Airtrek Turbo R’s chassis) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Pair with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (vented, 3kg weight reduction) and a custom front splitter (Rocket Bunny-style, 3D-printed ABS with aluminum supports).

Wheels & Stance: Mount Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +30 front, 18x10.5 +35 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Achieve aggressive fitment with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) and a 30mm front/rear lowering via Ohlins coilovers.

Interior & Details: Replace the stock seats with Bride Euro II (fixed-back, carbon shell) and install a custom roll cage (Sparco Pro2000, 6-point, bolt-in) with gusseted rear strut towers. Add a Defi Advance BF gauges (oil temp, boost, wideband AFR) in a custom A-pillar pod, and wrap the interior in Alcantara (black/red) with custom stitching (Momo Steering Wheel, NRG quick-release hub).
